column1: # System Settings deeplinks. Each row becomes ONE top-level palette command
# typing e.g. "Accessibility" jumps straight to that pane. Generated at build
# time by default.nix; there is no per-pane script to maintain, only this table.
# Columns (tab-separated):  bundle-id  <TAB>  Display name  <TAB>  SF Symbol
# Every bundle id below is a REAL settings extension, not a guess: macOS ships
# each pane as an ExtensionKit bundle that opts into the URL scheme. To refresh
# this list on a new macOS (new panes, renamed ids), dump the authoritative set
# and reconcile against the names/icons here:
# The bundle ids are stable across releases (verified on macOS 26); names/icons
# are hand-curated for the palette. Lines starting with # and blank lines are
# skipped. Users can shadow or add their own via ~/.config/pounce/commands.
